headline: A Look At Progressive (PGR) Valuation After Recent Share Price Softness
summary: What Progressive’s recent performance signals for investors With no single headline event driving attention, Progressive (PGR) is drawing investor interest after a mix of shorter term share price moves and current valuation metrics have put the insurer back on many watchlists. See our latest analysis for Progressive. Shorter term trading has been softer, with a 1 day share price return of 2.16% and a 90 day share price return of 3.46%, while the 3 year total shareholder return of 61.78% and 5...
